raw: {"perspective": "Security", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/app/[locale]/page.tsx", "issue": "Landing page presents VOLAURA as standalone talent platform without reference to MindShift, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, or ZEUS. Creates identity fragmentation: attack surface where users perceive isolated products instead of unified organism.", "recommended_fix": "Reflect Constitution v1.2: reframe as 'Atlas presents: five faces of focused intelligence.' Link each face as a skill of the core platform."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Identity fragmentation enables impersonation attacks — compromised face could be isolated and spoofed without detection by user or system."}

findings.issue: Landing page presents VOLAURA as standalone talent platform without reference to MindShift, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, or ZEUS. Creates identity fragmentation: attack surface where users perceive isolated products instead of unified organism.
findings.recommended_fix: Reflect Constitution v1.2: reframe as 'Atlas presents: five faces of focused intelligence.' Link each face as a skill of the core platform.

whistleblower_flag: Identity fragmentation enables impersonation attacks — compromised face could be isolated and spoofed without detection by user or system.
